description: Superb, its literally got me to number 1 on google in my area, easy to use. Without a doubt wort the monthly cost.
author: Mark P.
pros: Partoo are helpful in guiding me through how to nail my google SEO, staff are always helpful ion our catch up calls, giving me tips on how to constantly do better
cons: It's getting less and less common, but when I started using the system (1.5 years ago) I encountered a lot of French, on the website, in email communications and calendars links, not critical but a little annoying as I sometimes found it difficult to navigate/understand,

description: l have had a very good response from my clients regarding reviews and also very easy to use
author: Timothy N.
pros: I like PARTOO because it is easy to use , as you can send messages to a multiple clients so to give a good after sell service
cons: My wording is limited to type on the SMS that is send out.

description: We have seen more business as we get more numbers of reviews daily
author: Tebogo M.
pros: Instant reply from clients and multiple platform to use
cons: Some clients only give stars instead of writing a complements

description: managing a numeber of locations, review managment, posting and necessery changes
author: Tomasz K.
pros: all businesses in one place, review managment, alerts
cons: dooesn't work with typical local services such as yanosik

review_title: Best Review Booster for your company
author: Anthonio B.
pros: I find Partoo very user friendly and easy to use. It does not require a very skillful person to start using the app. I like the fact that you can personalize your review as it makes the customer feel more at urge to write a review. I guess what I like the most is the fact that they give training and make it an effort on making sure you understand how to use the app.
cons: I cant really pin point what needs to improve as it works better then all of the rest I have used. The live chat is so helpfull that if you have a problem you get a response almost immediately. The staff is so helpfull and friendly and it does not matter what part of the world you from they always give there 100% in getting you sorted.

description: Excellent, is one of our best partners in the company, with a very useful service, excellent source of data and an amazing team
author: Omar E.
pros: All the data that can be use for making desitions, the capacity to make changes in low time, and the team is always available for helping us
cons: Some features are not always clear for peeple that's not expert in the area but the team always take time to explain any doubt

author: leon K.
pros: easy to use and great to get feedback on
cons: nothing as yet, works easy and easy to send

review_title: The go to tool for Hyperlocal Strategy
description: I am very happy on the overall deliverables and wish the team all the best
author: Raguraman R.
pros: Easy to broadcast hyperlocal information across platforms especially Google My Business and Facebook and handle are ratings and reviews on these platforms in a single window.
cons: Sometimes, the Reviews and Recommendations are not traceable and difficult to pick up a conversation or identify a review at a later date

description: Easy , quick and great reviews coming in - gain more clients and clients are impressed with how easy it is to use
author: Sandy C.
pros: Wow Amazing service that has help boost my client tell at my store, client trust the link and it is super easy to use - we have the app open on our desktops, so it is easy to access, and that SMS get delivered immediately to clients while in the store with us - clients are happy to review us!!
cons: Nothing - it is easy to use, and it simple - sometimes client only put starts and don't write something, but still good for 5 stars better than nothing.

description: Great experience and follow up, but after the initial regular meetings I have not heard back. Maybe it would be nice to receive a quartely review of what I should change in my tags or posts to increase the visits to my websites
author: Giada G.
pros: I like the possibility to do posts and upload pictures. It's nice the idea of sending reviews request via sms but I've seen no one use it and also the barcode. It's extremely hard to get reviews in the spirituality industry. Easier for shops and restaurants, not appropriated after work of wellbeing or healing.
cons: Missing the possibility to post on instragram

author: Luigi D.
pros: La semplicità di raccolta e gestione delle recensioni. Utilissima ed immediata app e suo utilizzo da mobile
cons: A volte trovo delle risposte partite in automatico senza averle messe io . Esempio grazie per la sua recensione..

review_title: Gran aliado para la presencia online de tu negocio
description: La experiencia ha sido muy satisfactoria, nos ha permitido recuperar fichas y crear nuevas en tiempo record.
author: Isabel A.
pros: El servicio es excelente, cuentas con un equipo muy capacitado y dispuesto a brindar soluciones. Los tiempos de carga de información son muy eficientes y la plataforma muy amigable de usar.
cons: El proceso de carga de la información o edición de los nombres de los puntos.

description: Gratificante leggere le recensioni lasciate dai nostri clienti più soddisfatti e costruttivo nel apprendere le esperienze di acquisto meno felici
author: luigi F.
pros: La velocità di risposta alle recensioni ed è molto comodo l'utilizzo delle risposte preimpostate
cons: Per il nostro utilizzo è perfetto, ci aiuta a migliorare e ad acquisire gratificazioni

author: Brunella C.
pros: Facile da usare, velocizza il mio lavoro
cons: Da migliorare la ricerca per parole chiave

review_title: Buena herramienta para gestionar tu negocio en Google
author: Salvador A.
pros: Me parece una herramienta muy intuitiva y fácil de utilizar, que permite optimizar la presencia de tu negocio en Google, sobre todo cuando gestionas varios establecimientos como es nuestro caso. Además, la respuesta del personal de soporte es rápida y siempre están dispuestos a ofrecer soluciones.
cons: Me gustaría más libertad a la hora de dar atribuciones a otros gerentes dentro de la cuenta, sin limitaciones por grupos de establecimientos.

review_title: Strumento molto utile che consente di ridurre notevolmente i tempi
description: Mi ha permesso di avere tutte le pagine aziendali in un unico strumento e soprattutto avere dati aggregati
author: Ernesto C.
pros: Integrazione delle pagine e dashboard per report
cons: non ho notato ancora punti di debolezza.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Claudia L.
pros: Tener todo en una misma herramienta. La facilidad de subir contenido y hacer publicaciones simultáneas.
cons: Hay algunas funcionalidades de google que todavía no están, por sacarle un pero.

review_title: Fácil de usar y bastante completo
description: Fácil de usar y bastante completo
author: Antonio R.
pros: Fácil de usar y bastante completo Lo usamos varios usuarios a diario
cons: El quitar reseñas falsas, es casi imposible
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Gregory A.
pros: Rien car je paye pour rien avoir même pas de réponse par mail.
cons: Relationnel, compétences, connaissances, techniques.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Todo lo que necesitas de tu ficha de negocio centralizado
description: Muy satisfecha, a nivel funcional de la herramienta y a nivel personal con el equipo de soporte y demás compañeros. Ya son 4 o 5? años con vosotros y os recomiendo a todos los compañeros del sector
author: Laura M.
pros: Todo está centralizado, encontrar o gestionar cualquier necesidad es super sencillo y además, como tenemos implantada la API, se centraliza todo en la plataforma y es una maravilla.
cons: Se han eliminado funciones que antes disponíamos (gráficos de reseñas antiguas Vs Nuevas), este material era muy representativo para enviar a las clínicas para que vieran su evolución

review_title: Controllo totale e centralizzato sulle tue schede google my business
author: Laura F.
pros: Partoo permette di gestire tutte le schede google my business della tua azienda in maniera veloce ed efficiente garantendoti un controllo totale sulle stesse. Per chi gestisce l'identità digitale di un grande gruppo è uno strumento davvero incredibile grazie anche a tutti i servizi correlati come la risposta alle recensioni.
cons: L'unica "pecca" di partoo se così si può definire è che per vedere le modifiche su google l'attesa è un po' lunga pertanto va gestito tutto con qualche giorno di anticipo.

review_title: Un'ottima piattaforma supportata da un team eccezionale
description: La mia esperienza con Partoo è stata molto positiva. La combinazione tra l'eccellente qualità del servizio offerto e la continua innovazione tecnologica rende questa piattaforma una scelta vincente per chi cerca strumenti avanzati e un supporto di alto livello.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Partoo si distingue per il suo team competente e disponibile, sempre pronto a supportarti in ogni esigenza. Inoltre, il loro sviluppo tecnologico avanzato, con l'integrazione di strumenti innovativi come l'intelligenza artificiale, rappresenta un grande valore aggiunto.
cons: Non ho riscontrato particolari aspetti negativi nell'utilizzo della piattaforma.

author: STÉPHANE F.
pros: Offre plaisante au premier abord mais rien ne se passe comme le commercial de PARTOO me l'a annoncé... il ne travaille pas votre référencement mais vous facture leur prestation comme prévu sans scrupule malgré leur incompétence.
cons: Après 2 mois de facturation chez PARTOO, je constate très rapidement que je ne progresse en rien sur mon référencement naturel sur le Web, je fais donc une réclamation car le commercial qui m'a vendu leur prestation, m'expose clairement quand acceptant de travailler avec eux, tout sera magnifique et que je serai en tête sur les moteurs recherches (Google etc) pour mon activité et ma région après 2 ou 3 mois... seulement tout est faux, ils me répondent par mail qu'ils n'ont pas une obligation de résultat mais ils m'envoient leurs factures mensuels que j'ai bien entendu bloquer en banque sur leurs prélèvements. Car en tant que client, oui je leur réclame un droit de résultat avant de payer leur facture et pour ma part, ils ne travailles pas mon entreprise mais uniquement pour remplir leur compte en banque mais ca ne va pas fonctionner comme cela avec moi. Si une société est dans une situation ou cas similaire similaire, prenons contacte ensemble, ne nous laissons pas faire par cette entreprise.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: HONTEUX => pratiques malhonnêtes, et incompétence des services admins
description: HONTEUX => Client et partenaire de Partoo depuis plusieurs mois, nous avons observé une dégradation de la qualité de service. Malgré nos demandes répétées de résiliation par email, la direction et les services administratifs semblent vouloir se jouer de nous en prétextant ne prendre en compte notre demande que lorsque nous aurons été recontacté par chargé de compte..., tout en continuant les prélèvements mensuels. La Manigance dure depuis 3 mois maintenant. Fonder sa réussite sur des pratiques malhonnêtes, c'est malheureusement la voie qu'a choisi Partoo !
author: philippe P.
pros: Trop peu malheureusement à comparer du prix demandé.
cons: Impossible à résilier alors que je suis à la lettre les directives des CGV. La manigance est bien rodée !

author: Jennifer R.
pros: La facilità di utilizzo, l'accessibilità e l'interfaccia accattivante
cons: Ad oggi non ho svantaggi da segnalare!!!
